channel.title: AI & UK Property: The Daily Briefing
channel.description: A daily two-host discussion on how AI is changing UK estate agency and conveyancing.
channel.itunes:author: Rich

item.title: AI & UK Property: The Daily Briefing — 2026-07-20
item.description: Today's AI-in-property discussion, generated from the day's UK estate agency and conveyancing news.
